Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. TruffleRuby 147 upvotes, 16 comments
  2. TinyLoRA – Learning to Reason in 13 Parameters 195 upvotes, 25 comments
  3. MiniStack (replacement for LocalStack) 253 upvotes, 47 comments
  4. 6o6 v1.1: Faster 6502-on-6502 virtualization for a C64/Apple II Apple-1 emulator 14 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. Teenage Engineering's PO-32 acoustic modem and synth implementation 128 upvotes, 26 comments
  6. Bring Back MiniDV with This Raspberry Pi FireWire Hat 75 upvotes, 13 comments
  7. 4D Doom 230 upvotes, 56 comments
  8. CERN levels up with new superconducting karts 201 upvotes, 48 comments
  9. Digitizing photos from the 1998 Game Boy Camera 58 upvotes, 10 comments
  10. A dot a day keeps the clutter away 390 upvotes, 110 comments
  11. Claude Code Unpacked : A visual guide 628 upvotes, 195 comments
  12. Chess in SQL 90 upvotes, 21 comments
  13. Show HN: Postgres extension for BM25 relevance-ranked full-text search 169 upvotes, 47 comments
  14. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 342 upvotes, 107 comments
  15. Intuiting Pratt Parsing 52 upvotes, 12 comments
  16. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1866 upvotes, 753 comments
  17. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 1239 upvotes, 503 comments
  18. Show HN: 1-Bit Bonsai, the First Commercially Viable 1-Bit LLMs 309 upvotes, 123 comments
  19. Claude Wrote a Full FreeBSD Remote Kernel RCE with Root Shell (CVE-2026-4747) 92 upvotes, 30 comments
  20. Ordinary Lab Gloves May Have Skewed Microplastic Data 117 upvotes, 43 comments
  21. Show HN: CLI to order groceries via reverse-engineered REWE API (Haskell) 122 upvotes, 46 comments
  22. Show HN: Sycamore – next gen Rust UI library powered by fine-grained reactivity 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  23. I Quit. The Clankers Won 103 upvotes, 60 comments
  24. In Case of Emergency, Make Burrito Bison 3 (2017) 16 upvotes, 5 comments
  25. A Mysterious Numbers Station Is Broadcasting Through the Iran War 22 upvotes, 9 comments
  26. Neanderthals survived on a knife's edge for 350k years 172 upvotes, 132 comments
  27. OpenAI closes funding round at an $852B valuation 470 upvotes, 420 comments
  28. Slop is not necessarily the future 260 upvotes, 418 comments
  29. Why the US Navy won't blast the Iranians and 'open' Strait of Hormuz 389 upvotes, 1047 comments
  30. Wasmer (YC S19) Is Hiring – Rust and DevRel Positions 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 9:00pm, 1 April 2026. Source here.
